/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/drone/controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/drone/hardDrone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/simulation/sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/simulation/simThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/raylibGraphics/raylibGraphics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_sim.dir/src/drone/controllerDevice.cpp.o -o drone_sim  /usr/local/lib/libraylib.a -lGL -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11
